generated_by: AI-assisted public-source research; fitness GTM repair 2026-06-17
disclaimer: This GTM extension uses public sources and local base-report facts. Private-company revenue, founder self-funding, unit economics and losses are included only when a source gives a concrete amount; unsupported amounts are deliberately omitted.

founder_background: Khalil Zahar: YC page lists Khalil Zahar as Founder/CEO of FightCamp/Hykso.
Patrick Chandler: YC page lists Patrick Chandler as Founder/CMO with paid social, content and attribution background.
Alexandre Marcotte: YC page lists Alexandre Marcotte as Founder/CTO.
brand_timeline: 2016: accelerator YC W2016 - FightCamp/Hykso participated in Y Combinator Winter 2016; batch signal only, no invented founder cash amount.
2021-06: funding $90M - TechCrunch reports a $90M round led by NEA/Connect Ventures with famous fighters investing.
2021-06: total_funding $98M - TechCrunch reports $8M raised before the $90M round, bringing total to $98M.

founder_profiles.name: Khalil Zahar
founder_profiles.background_summary: YC page lists Khalil Zahar as Founder/CEO of FightCamp/Hykso.

founder_profiles.name: Patrick Chandler
founder_profiles.background_summary: YC page lists Patrick Chandler as Founder/CMO with paid social, content and attribution background.

founder_profiles.name: Alexandre Marcotte
founder_profiles.background_summary: YC page lists Alexandre Marcotte as Founder/CTO.

capital_history.description: FightCamp/Hykso participated in Y Combinator Winter 2016; batch signal only, no invented founder cash amount.
TechCrunch reports a $90M round led by NEA/Connect Ventures with famous fighters investing.
TechCrunch reports $8M raised before the $90M round, bringing total to $98M.

research_gaps: Current membership price needs checkout/account confirmation before treating as live price.
Revenue and profitability are not reliably public.

gtm_extension.summary: FightCamp 的 GTM 是“真实拳击器材 + 传感器追踪 + 订阅课程”的垂直化 Peloton。它不像 Growl 那样押注昂贵投影硬件，也不像 Peloton 那样覆盖全运动，而是把用户的拳击动机、可量化击打数据和名人/拳手背书组合成家庭拳击训练系统。重点是垂直场景如何用更低硬件门槛换取持续训练数据。
gtm_extension.one_sentence_gtm: FightCamp 的 GTM 是“真实拳击器材 + 传感器追踪 + 订阅课程”的垂直化 Peloton。
channel_path: YC 背书和早期硬件用户验证
转向 FightCamp 订阅内容和完整套装
名人拳手和 $90M 融资扩大声量
当前用更低入门包和 App/AI Motion 延续转化

channels.dtc: 官方独立站或官方票务页承接高意向购买。
channels.pr_media: 评测、报道、创始人资料和公开数据库提供基础信任。
channels.community: 用户评价、成绩榜、课程社区或赛事照片决定口碑扩散。
channels.partners: 经销商、合作健身房、顾问、赞助商或明星投资人提供第二层信任。
channels.service: 售后、安装、退换、维修和交付节奏决定高客单价是否可持续。
channels.yc: YC 页面提供创始人和早期公司信任。
channels.celebrity: 拳王和 UFC 投资人带来品类权威。

business_model.pricing_logic: 用 $299+ 入门降低尝试门槛，过去完整套装可达 $1,219-$1,349。
business_model.channel_economics: 硬件比 Growl/Tonal 轻，内容和会员承担长期价值。

gtm_extension.top_products_selection_rule: 最多选 3 个产品线；按用户购买决策、价格结构、GTM 学习价值和公开证据选择。

top_products.name: FightCamp Connect / Core / Elite
top_products.why_selected: 当前官网主转化产品线。
top_products.origin_story: 该产品线是品牌 GTM 的主要承载物，负责把定位、价格、渠道和交付能力变成用户可购买的方案。
top_products.pre_market: 上市或预售前的关键动作是明确用户要替代什么：私教、健身房、精品团课、拳击馆、赛事报名，还是一台传统器械。
top_products.innovation: Console + trackers + wraps + optional bag/gloves/HR monitor。
top_products.breakout: 突破点不只在产品参数，而在价格结构、渠道叙事和真实用户可验证的交付结果。
top_products.customer_impact: 用户购买时会同时计算硬件价、配件价、服务费、软件/订阅边界、竞品总成本和售后风险。
top_products.ecosystem_impact: 它改变了同类品牌解释价值的方式：要么证明自己更专业，要么证明自己总拥有成本更低。

pricing_model.product_price: Current official site says packages starting at $299; TechCrunch/WIRED historical kit prices ranged $439-$1,349 and Personal package around $1,219.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Legacy membership in TechCrunch/WIRED: $39/month for streaming workouts; current official account pages should confirm active plans.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: Elite includes free-standing bag, bag ring, boxing gloves, heart-rate monitor; Connect excludes bag for users with existing gear.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: Growl $4,500 + $60/mo or $150-$190/mo financing; Peloton Bike $1,695 + $49.99/mo; Tonal 2 $4,295 + $59.95/mo; Speediance GM2 $3,390-$4,799 no mandatory subscription.

sources.title: The Verge GROWL pricing and product report

what_to_learn: 先把用户的替代对象讲清楚，再决定硬件复杂度和渠道顺序。
价格表必须包含产品本体、配件/服务、软件/订阅和竞品总成本。
GTM 的重点不是曝光，而是让用户相信交付、售后和长期内容能兑现。
do_not_copy_blindly: 不要把众筹、疫情红利或媒体报道当成长期留存。
不要在没有可靠来源时补写创始人自筹金额、单台毛利或亏损数字。

top_products.name: FightCamp App / tracking content
top_products.why_selected: 数据化拳击课程是复购核心。
top_products.origin_story: 该产品线是品牌 GTM 的主要承载物，负责把定位、价格、渠道和交付能力变成用户可购买的方案。

pricing_model.product_price: App access bundled or sold with membership depending on plan.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Subscription/software fee: historical $39/mo membership for workouts and tutorials.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: trackers, wraps, gloves and bag are required for full metric experience.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor subscription comparison: Peloton $49.99/mo All-Access; Tonal $59.95/mo; Speediance optional $19.99/mo; Growl planned $60/mo.

pricing_model.product_price: B2B price is quote-based on official channel, so report avoids fixed amount.
pricing_model.subscription_fee: Subscription/software boundary: gym deployment likely service/account based; exact fee should be quoted by FightCamp.
pricing_model.accessory_service_fee: Accessory/service price: studios need bags, trackers, wraps, consoles and replacement parts.
pricing_model.competitor_price: Competitor price comparison: HYROX gym affiliation about £100/month in media report; Peloton commercial/hotel placements use enterprise terms; Tonal for Business quote-based.

不要在没有可靠来源时补写创始人自筹金额、单台毛利或亏损数字。

learning_summary: FightCamp shows a focused vertical can compete against broad fitness ecosystems.
Hardware price is much lower than Growl/Tonal, but content freshness matters.
名人投资要转化为真实训练信任，而不只是曝光。
gtm_extension.evidence_boundary: 没有可靠金额来源的创始人自筹、单台毛利、广告花费、退货损失不写入事实表，只在研究缺口中说明。
